questionHtml: Explain why proton pump inhibitors alleviate the symptoms of H. pylori infections.
markschemeHtml:
a. as proton pumps are inhibited less protons/H+ into stomach «lumen» 

b. «less protons/H+ in stomach» less hydrochloric acid produced 
OR
stomach «contents» become less acidic 
OWTTE.

c. stomach heals with higher pH

meta.title: Explain why proton pump inhibitors alleviate the symptoms of H. pylori infections.
